---
title: "Linear Algebra"
description: "Core concepts in linear algebra with applications to Machine Learning."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort: "order asc"
---
## Topics

Core concepts in linear algebra with applications to Machine Learning.

> **Reference:** <https://www.coursera.org/learn/machine-learning-linear-algebra>

### Notes
